description: Note to Seʿadya the cantor. Dating: Probably 12th or 13th century. In Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic. Asking him to list the contributors to a collection (pesiqa) made the day before and to cash in the sums promised. (Information from Goitein’s index card.)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
